seo.title: LUNA Studies | International Education for Global Students
seo.description: LUNA Studies (Luna Education) provides personalised tutoring for MAP, WIDA, AEIS, TOEFL, English and bilingual education for students in Japan, Singapore and online.

hero.label: Empowering Students
hero.description: Personalised learning, expert tutors, and global programs that help students build confidence and succeed anywhere.

tutorFeedback.title: Tutor Feedback
tutorFeedback.name: Mr. Francis
tutorFeedback.comment: Excellent effort! Your arguments are well-structured and clear.

pathways.label: Global Pathways
pathways.description: Luna supports students across Singapore, Japan, international schools, and global university pathways through English, test prep, and academic confidence.

japan.desc: International schools, bilingual education, MAP/WIDA support, and interview preparation.

singapore.desc: English foundations, AEIS pathways, international school transition, and academic confidence.

australia.desc: Academic writing, speaking confidence, IELTS-style communication, and global learning skills.

others.desc: Critical thinking, reading comprehension, presentation skills, and boarding school readiness.

whyPreview.label: Why Luna?
whyPreview.description: Luna combines assessment, tutor matching, progress tracking, and parent feedback so every lesson has a clear purpose.

assessment.title: Assessment first
assessment.desc: We identify strengths, weak points, and learning priorities before lessons begin.

matching.title: Tutor matching
matching.desc: Students are matched with tutors based on learning goals, personality, and academic needs.

progress.title: Visible progress
progress.desc: Parents can understand progress through feedback, goals, and measurable improvement.

support.title: Continuous support
support.desc: We adjust learning plans instead of repeating the same lesson style forever.

process.label: Luna Learning System ✨
process.title: A clear path to real improvement
process.description: From trial assessment to final evaluation, every step is designed to make progress visible, structured, and personal.

assessment.title: Trial Assessment
assessment.desc: We check the student’s current level, strengths, and weak points.

report.title: Comprehensive Report
report.desc: Parents receive a clear breakdown of reading, writing, speaking, and test skills.

matching.title: Tutor Matching
matching.desc: We match each student with the most suitable tutor and learning style.

tracking.title: Progress Tracking
tracking.desc: Homework, lesson notes, and improvement are followed continuously.

evaluation.title: Final Evaluation
evaluation.desc: We review growth and suggest the next learning plan.

tutorsSection.label: Meet our tutors ✨
tutorsSection.description: Our tutors bring global experience, academic strategy, and personal support to every student.

mimi.desc: Specialises in MAP Reading, TOEFL speaking, and international school admissions.

grace.desc: Supports students with structured test prep, academic writing, and reading skills.

francis.desc: Helps students build confidence in reasoning, problem-solving, and exam strategies.

cj.desc: Focuses on confident communication, school interviews, and academic English.

christine.desc: Guides students through comprehension, vocabulary growth, and writing feedback.

kana.desc: Helps students build strong Japanese foundations through grammar, vocabulary, conversation, and JLPT practice.

enquiry.label: Ready to begin?
enquiry.description: Tell us the student’s goals, current level, and learning concerns. We’ll help you choose the right support path.

footer.description: Personalized international education support for students in Singapore, Japan, and beyond.

seo.title: LUNA Programs | Assessment Preparation & Academic Support
seo.description: Explore LUNA Studies programs including MAP, WIDA, CAT4, AEIS, TOEFL, IELTS, JLPT, HSK, English, Math, Japanese and Mandarin support.

hero.label: Luna Programs
hero.description: From assessment preparation to long-term academic support, each Luna program is designed with clear goals, personalised guidance and measurable progress.

assessment.label: Exam & Assessment Preparation
assessment.title: Assessment Preparation
assessment.description: Targeted support for international school assessments, entrance exams, and language proficiency tests.

academic.label: Academic & Language Support
academic.title: Academic Support
academic.description: Long-term subject support for English, math, Japanese, Mandarin, speaking, writing, and school learning.

map.title: MAP Preparation
map.body: Preparation for MAP Reading, Language Usage and Mathematics.
map.details: MAP is commonly used by international schools to understand a student's academic growth in reading, language usage and mathematics. Luna helps students become familiar with MAP-style questions, academic vocabulary and adaptive test formats.
map.suitableFor: Students applying to or currently studying in international schools that use MAP testing.

detailPage.heroLine: Luna helps students build confidence with MAP-style reading, language usage and math questions through targeted practice and progress tracking.
cover: MAP Language Usage grammar and sentence structure
MAP Mathematics concepts and word problems
Adaptive test strategies and timing habits
lunaHelps: Identify the student’s weaker skill areas before lessons begin
Build a personalised learning plan instead of random worksheet practice
Use targeted question practice to strengthen accuracy and confidence
Track progress so parents can clearly see what is improving
outcomes: More consistent performance under timed conditions

faq.q: Can Luna help with MAP Reading and Math?
faq.a: Yes. We support MAP Reading, Language Usage and Mathematics depending on the student’s needs.

faq.q: Is this suitable for international school students?
faq.a: Yes. This program is designed especially for students applying to or currently studying in international schools.

wida.title: WIDA Preparation
wida.body: English language development support for WIDA assessments.
wida.details: WIDA assessments evaluate students' English language development across listening, speaking, reading and writing. Luna supports students with structured language practice, academic vocabulary and confidence-building activities.
wida.suitableFor: International school students who need support with English language development or WIDA-style assessment tasks.

detailPage.heroLine: Luna supports students with WIDA-style listening, speaking, reading and writing so they can communicate more confidently in school.
lunaHelps: Help students express ideas more clearly in English
Build confidence in speaking tasks and classroom communication
Improve academic vocabulary used in international schools
Support writing accuracy and organisation

faq.q: Does Luna help with WIDA speaking?
faq.a: Yes. We help students practise structured speaking, pronunciation, vocabulary and confidence.

faq.q: Is WIDA only about grammar?
faq.a: No. WIDA focuses on English language development across listening, speaking, reading and writing.

cat4.title: CAT4 Preparation
cat4.body: Verbal, non-verbal, quantitative and spatial reasoning preparation.
cat4.details: CAT4 measures reasoning ability across verbal, non-verbal, quantitative and spatial areas. Luna helps students understand question types, improve reasoning habits and approach unfamiliar problems with confidence.
cat4.suitableFor: Students preparing for CAT4 assessments, international school placement, or academic ability testing.

detailPage.heroLine: Luna helps students understand CAT4 question types and develop stronger reasoning habits across verbal, non-verbal, quantitative and spatial tasks.
lunaHelps: Introduce unfamiliar CAT4 question formats step by step
Teach students how to recognise patterns and eliminate wrong answers
Build confidence with reasoning questions
Reduce panic when facing abstract or unfamiliar tasks

faq.q: Can CAT4 be prepared for?
faq.a: Students cannot memorise CAT4, but they can become familiar with question styles and improve reasoning strategies.

faq.q: Is CAT4 similar to normal school exams?
faq.a: No. CAT4 focuses more on reasoning ability than memorised school knowledge.

aeis.title: AEIS Preparation
aeis.body: English and Math preparation for Singapore government school entry.
aeis.details: AEIS is an entrance exam for international students who wish to apply to Singapore government schools. Luna supports students with English, mathematics, exam strategies and structured practice.
aeis.suitableFor: Students planning to apply to Singapore government schools through AEIS.

detailPage.heroLine: Luna supports AEIS preparation through structured English and Mathematics lessons for students aiming to enter Singapore government schools.
lunaHelps: Build the English foundation needed for AEIS
Strengthen math problem-solving and accuracy
Provide structured homework and feedback
Help students prepare steadily instead of cramming

faq.q: Does Luna teach both AEIS English and Math?
faq.a: Yes. We can support both subjects depending on the student’s level.

faq.q: Is AEIS difficult?
faq.a: AEIS can be challenging because students need both subject knowledge and strong English comprehension.

toefl.title: TOEFL Preparation
toefl.body: Structured preparation for TOEFL English proficiency examinations.
toefl.details: TOEFL is an internationally recognised English proficiency test used for school and university applications. Luna helps students improve reading, listening, speaking and writing through structured exam practice.
toefl.suitableFor: Students preparing for international school entry, university admission, or English proficiency requirements.

detailPage.heroLine: Luna helps students prepare for TOEFL with structured support across reading, listening, speaking and writing.
lunaHelps: Diagnose which TOEFL sections need the most work
Teach clear structures for speaking and writing responses
Build academic vocabulary and reading speed
Review mistakes and improve test-taking habits

faq.q: Can Luna help with TOEFL speaking?
faq.a: Yes. We help students practise structured responses, fluency and confidence.

faq.q: Do you provide TOEFL writing feedback?
faq.a: Yes. Students can receive feedback on structure, grammar, vocabulary and clarity.

ielts.title: IELTS Preparation
ielts.body: Academic and General IELTS preparation with personalised guidance.
ielts.details: IELTS is widely used for academic, immigration and professional English requirements. Luna provides targeted support for reading, writing, listening, speaking and band-score improvement.
ielts.suitableFor: Students or learners preparing for IELTS Academic or General Training.

detailPage.heroLine: Luna helps IELTS learners improve band-score readiness through personalised reading, writing, listening and speaking practice.
cover: IELTS Speaking fluency and answer structure
lunaHelps: Identify the student’s current IELTS weaknesses
Teach practical writing structures for Task 1 and Task 2
Improve speaking confidence with guided practice
Give feedback that helps students understand how to improve

faq.q: Can Luna help with IELTS Writing?
faq.a: Yes. We focus on essay structure, task response, grammar, vocabulary and coherence.

faq.q: Do you support IELTS Speaking?
faq.a: Yes. Lessons can include mock speaking practice, answer development and pronunciation support.

jlpt.title: JLPT Preparation
jlpt.body: Targeted preparation for JLPT N5 to N1 examinations.
jlpt.details: JLPT assesses Japanese language ability across vocabulary, grammar, reading and listening. Luna supports learners from beginner to advanced levels with structured JLPT-focused preparation.
jlpt.suitableFor: Students preparing for JLPT N5, N4, N3, N2 or N1, or learners building Japanese for school and daily communication.

detailPage.heroLine: Luna supports JLPT learners from N5 to N1 with structured vocabulary, grammar, reading and listening preparation.
lunaHelps: Create a clear study plan based on the target JLPT level
Break grammar points into simple explanations
Build vocabulary and kanji steadily
Use mock questions to check readiness before the exam
outcomes: More confidence for JLPT exam day

faq.q: Which JLPT levels can Luna support?
faq.a: We can support learners preparing for JLPT N5, N4, N3, N2 and N1 depending on tutor availability.

faq.q: Can beginners start with Luna?
faq.a: Yes. Students can begin with basic Japanese lessons before moving into JLPT preparation.

hsk.title: HSK Preparation
hsk.body: Chinese proficiency preparation for HSK examinations.
hsk.details: HSK is a Chinese proficiency exam for non-native learners. Luna helps students build vocabulary, grammar, reading, listening and writing skills for HSK preparation.
hsk.suitableFor: Students preparing for HSK exams or learners who want structured Mandarin proficiency development.

detailPage.heroLine: Luna helps learners prepare for HSK through Mandarin vocabulary, grammar, reading, listening and writing support.
lunaHelps: Build Mandarin foundations according to the target HSK level
Improve recognition of common words and sentence structures
Practise exam-style reading and listening questions
Support students with homework and revision planning

faq.q: Can Luna help beginners prepare for HSK?
faq.a: Yes. Beginners can start with basic Mandarin before moving into HSK-focused practice.

faq.q: Does HSK include speaking?
faq.a: Standard HSK mainly focuses on listening, reading and writing, while speaking can be supported separately.

foundation.title: English Foundation
foundation.body: Grammar, vocabulary, reading and writing support.
foundation.details: This program strengthens core English skills including grammar, vocabulary, sentence structure, reading comprehension and writing accuracy.
foundation.suitableFor: Students with weaker English foundations who need step-by-step support.

detailPage.heroLine: Luna helps students build a stronger English foundation through grammar, vocabulary, reading and writing support.
lunaHelps: Find the gaps in the student’s English foundation
Teach grammar clearly and step by step
Build reading confidence through guided practice
Support students with homework and regular feedback

faq.q: Is this suitable for weaker English students?
faq.a: Yes. This program is designed for students who need patient, step-by-step support.

faq.q: Can Luna help with school English?
faq.a: Yes. Lessons can be adjusted to support the student’s school curriculum and homework.

speaking.title: Speaking & Writing
speaking.body: Build confidence in communication, presentations and academic writing.
speaking.details: This program builds strong communication skills through structured speaking, writing, presentation, discussion and essay practice.
speaking.suitableFor: Students who need to improve expression, writing structure, speaking confidence and academic communication.

detailPage.heroLine: Luna helps students express themselves more clearly through speaking, presentation, discussion and writing practice.
lunaHelps: Build confidence when expressing ideas
Teach students how to organise answers logically
Develop presentation and discussion skills
Improve writing structure and clarity

faq.q: Is this only for students with weak English?
faq.a: No. Many students join to improve communication, presentation and academic writing beyond school requirements.

faq.q: Can Luna help with speech presentations?
faq.a: Yes. Lessons can include presentation planning, speaking practice and confidence building.

math.title: Math Support
math.body: Grade-level mathematics support and problem-solving development.
math.details: Our math support focuses on building conceptual understanding, calculation accuracy, word-problem skills and exam confidence.
math.suitableFor: Students who need support in math or want to strengthen grade-level foundations.

detailPage.heroLine: Luna supports students through structured mathematics lessons that strengthen understanding, accuracy and problem-solving confidence.
lunaHelps: Identify weak mathematical concepts
Strengthen understanding instead of memorisation
Develop problem-solving habits
Provide targeted practice and feedback

faq.q: Can Luna support international school math?
faq.a: Yes. We support students across different international school curricula and grade levels.

faq.q: Do lessons focus on homework?
faq.a: Homework can be incorporated, but lessons are designed around the student's overall learning needs.

japanese.title: Japanese Lessons
japanese.body: Beginner to advanced Japanese language learning and school support.
japanese.details: We offer Japanese lessons covering grammar, vocabulary, conversation, reading, writing and school-based Japanese support.
japanese.suitableFor: Students learning Japanese for school, exams, communication or personal development.

detailPage.heroLine: Luna provides personalised Japanese lessons for beginners, school support, conversation practice and long-term language development.
lunaHelps: Build a structured Japanese foundation
Support school assignments and examinations
Develop practical communication skills
Prepare students for future JLPT pathways

faq.q: Do I need JLPT goals to join?
faq.a: No. Students can learn Japanese for school, daily life, communication or personal interest.

faq.q: Can complete beginners join?
faq.a: Yes. We support learners from beginner to advanced levels.

mandarin.title: Mandarin Lessons
mandarin.body: Speaking, reading, writing and bilingual Mandarin support.
mandarin.details: Structured Mandarin lessons for international school students, beginners, heritage learners and students building bilingual confidence.
mandarin.suitableFor: Students learning Mandarin for school, communication, reading, writing or bilingual development.

detailPage.heroLine: Luna helps students develop Mandarin speaking, reading and writing skills through personalised lessons and structured progression.
lunaHelps: Build Mandarin confidence step by step
Support bilingual and international school students
Strengthen reading and writing foundations
Prepare students for future HSK pathways if needed

faq.q: Is this suitable for heritage Chinese learners?
faq.a: Yes. Lessons can be adapted for heritage learners, bilingual students and complete beginners.

faq.q: Can Luna help with school Chinese?
faq.a: Yes. Lessons can support school curriculum, homework and examination preparation.

subjectDetail.overviewTitle: A personalised plan, not random practice.
subjectDetail.coverTitle: Lessons focused on what your child actually needs.
subjectDetail.approachDescription: We do not just assign worksheets. Luna combines diagnosis, planning, personalised tutoring, homework feedback and progress tracking.

diagnostic.title: Diagnostic Review
diagnostic.text: We first understand the student’s level and learning gaps.

plan.title: Learning Plan
plan.text: Lessons are adjusted around the student’s goals and timeline.

matching.title: Tutor Matching
matching.text: We match students with suitable tutors for the subject.

tracking.title: Progress Tracking
tracking.text: Parents receive clearer visibility on learning progress.

subjectDetail.outcomesTitle: What students can build through this program.
subjectDetail.tutorTitle: Matched with the right Luna tutor.
subjectDetail.tutorDescription: Luna matches each student with a tutor based on the program, school background, learning style, current level and long-term goals. This helps lessons feel more personal, focused and effective.
subjectDetail.ctaDescription: Send us an enquiry and we’ll recommend the right tutor and learning plan for your child.

hero.label: Luna Intake Pass
hero.description: We’ll turn that into a tutor match, level diagnosis, and clear learning direction.

step4.text: We check level and create the next learning step.

step5.title: Final Evaluation
step5.text: Clear progress comparison with graphs and next-step guidance.

seo.title: Why Families Choose LUNA Studies | Personalised International Education
seo.description: Discover how LUNA Studies (Luna Education) supports students through personalised learning plans, tutor matching, academic tracking and international school preparation.

hero.label: Our Approach
hero.description: Luna Education combines elite tutors, personalised planning, structured assessments, and continuous support — so students don’t just attend lessons, they improve with direction.

highlights.questionBanks: Free question banks for registered students

typical.label: Typical tuition
typical.point1: Random worksheets without a clear learning path
typical.point3: Parents unsure whether progress is real

luna.label: Luna Education
luna.point3: Pre-test, mid-test, and post-test quality checks
luna.point4: Tutors matched by background, subject, and student needs

values.label: Our Values
values.description: At Luna Education, we don’t believe in random practice or passive learning. We focus on clarity, structure, and measurable improvement.

clarity.title: Clarity
clarity.text: Students should understand why an answer is correct, not just memorise it.

structure.title: Structure
structure.text: Learning should follow a clear path with direction and purpose.

growth.title: Growth
growth.text: Mistakes are not failures. They are signals for improvement.

responsibility.title: Responsibility
responsibility.text: Students take ownership while tutors guide and challenge them.

bullets.point1: Lessons follow a clear structure instead of random topics
bullets.point2: Mistakes are tracked and reviewed systematically
bullets.point3: Students learn how to explain answers, not just give them

tutors.title: Elite tutors with international backgrounds
tutors.text: Our tutors are young, driven, and carefully selected from strong academic backgrounds. We match students with tutors who understand different school systems, countries, and exam expectations.

planning.title: Personal planning for every student
planning.text: Every student receives a customised plan based on their level, target school, exam, and weaknesses. Lessons are not random — each step is designed with a purpose.

progress.title: Progress you can actually see
progress.text: We use pre-tests, mid-tests, and post-tests to check quality and improvement. Parents can clearly understand where the student started and how they are growing.

support.title: Support beyond lesson time
support.text: Registered students receive access to question banks and chat support for learning queries, so learning continues even outside class.

questionBank.label: Registered Student Benefit
questionBank.description: Registered students can practise with structured question banks matched to their goals. Tutors can then review mistakes and turn practice into targeted improvement.

review.label: Tutor Review
review.text: Mistakes become the next lesson plan.

cta.label: Start your journey ✨
cta.description: We’ll assess the student’s current level, identify strengths and weaknesses, and recommend a personalised learning plan designed around their goals.

seo.title: International Tutors in Japan & Singapore | LUNA Studies

hero.label: Our Tutors

hero.description: Our tutors are selected for strong academic backgrounds, clear communication, and the ability to adapt lessons to each student.

popup.label: Tutor Profile

items.name: Mimi

experience: Trilingual education in Japanese, English, and Mandarin
International school admission preparation

items.name: Francis

items.name: CJ

items.name: Christine

Grammar, reading, and writing support
Structured language-learning guidance
Patient coaching for confidence and communication skills

items.name: Kana
items.bio: A patient and structured Japanese tutor who helps students build strong foundations in grammar, vocabulary, speaking, and reading. She supports learners in gaining confidence through clear explanations and practical communication practice.
experience: Beginner to intermediate Japanese language tutoring
JLPT vocabulary and grammar preparation
Conversation practice for daily and academic situations
Support for students adapting to Japanese school or daily life

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.text: We may collect information such as names, email addresses, lesson preferences, student levels, and communication history when you use our services or submit enquiries.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Information
sections.text: Your information is used to provide tutoring services, manage accounts, respond to enquiries, improve learning support, and communicate important updates.

sections.title: 3. Student Data Protection
sections.text: We take reasonable steps to protect student information and restrict access to authorised tutors, staff, and administrators only.

sections.title: 4. Payments and Third-Party Services
sections.text: Some services may involve trusted third-party providers such as payment processors, email systems, scheduling tools, or analytics platforms.

sections.title: 5. Cookies and Analytics
sections.text: Our website may use cookies or analytics tools to improve user experience, understand website usage, and maintain platform functionality.

sections.title: 6. Sharing of Information
sections.text: We do not sell personal information. Information may only be shared where necessary for educational support, legal compliance, or operational purposes.

sections.title: 7. Data Retention
sections.text: We may retain account and learning information for operational, educational, and administrative purposes unless deletion is requested.

sections.title: 8. Contact
sections.text: For privacy-related questions, please contact us at enquiries@lunastudies.com.

sections.title: 1. Use of Our Services
sections.text: LUNA Studies provides tutoring, academic support, consultation, and related educational services. By using our website or services, you agree to use them responsibly and lawfully.

sections.title: 2. Student Accounts
sections.text: Students, tutors, and administrators may access protected areas using approved accounts or invite codes. You are responsible for keeping your login details secure.

sections.title: 3. Lessons and Scheduling
sections.text: Lesson schedules, formats, and tutor arrangements may vary depending on availability, student needs, and agreed learning plans.

sections.title: 4. Payments and Cancellations
sections.text: Fees, payment timing, cancellation rules, and rescheduling policies will be communicated separately before or during enrolment.

sections.title: 5. Learning Materials
sections.text: Worksheets, question banks, lesson materials, and feedback documents are provided for personal learning use only and may not be copied, shared, sold, or redistributed without permission.

sections.title: 6. Limitation of Guarantee
sections.text: We aim to support student improvement through structured tutoring, but we cannot guarantee specific exam scores, school admission results, or academic outcomes.

sections.title: 7. Changes to Terms
sections.text: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of our services means you accept the updated terms.

sections.title: 8. Contact
sections.text: For questions about these terms, please contact us at enquiries@lunastudies.com.
